channel.title: Learning Framework on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Learning Framework on Frank Huang

item.title: Learn pandas
item.description: dataframe.sum() by default, sum up each cell’s value by each column. Specify the axis attribute will to change the sum up rule. 0 means by columns, 1 means by rows. check if the dataframe has null value df.isnull().sum().sum() will sum up all the true value for each column and then each row. replace a certain value with other value df['column name'].map({'yes':1, 'no':0})
